title: Mycaranthes magnicallosa
taxonomy: Mycaranthes magnicallosa is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants, typically trees. The genus Mycaranthes is a group of orchids native to the tropical regions of the Pacific, particularly in the islands of Polynesia and Micronesia. Mycaranthes magnicallosa is one of the many species within this genus. The classification of Mycaranthes magnicallosa is further detailed in the botanical classification system, which includes the kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species.
